domain:
(define (domain plansys2_replanning_demo)
  (:requirements :strips :typing)
  (:types location)
  (:predicates
    (robot_at ?l - location)
    (connected ?from - location ?to - location)
    (visited ?l - location)
  )
  (:action move
    :parameters (?from - location ?to - location)
    :precondition (and (robot_at ?from) (connected ?from ?to))
    :effect (and (not (robot_at ?from)) (robot_at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
)
problem:
(define (problem plansys2_replanning_problem)
  (:domain plansys2_replanning_demo)
  (:objects livingroom entrance kitchen bedroom room gym - location)
  (:init
    (robot_at livingroom)
    (visited livingroom)
    (connected livingroom entrance)
    (connected entrance livingroom)
    (connected livingroom kitchen)
    (connected kitchen livingroom)
    (connected entrance kitchen)
    (connected kitchen entrance)
    (connected kitchen bedroom)
    (connected bedroom kitchen)
    (connected bedroom room)
    (connected room bedroom)
    (connected room gym)
    (connected gym room)
    (connected kitchen gym)
    (connected gym kitchen)
  )
  (:goal (and (visited bedroom) (visited gym)))
)

(define (problem plansys2_replanning_problem)
  (:domain plansys2_replanning_demo)
  (:objects livingroom entrance kitchen bedroom room gym - location)
  (:init
    (robot_at kitchen)
    (visited kitchen)
    (visited livingroom)
    (connected livingroom entrance)
    (connected entrance livingroom)
    (connected livingroom kitchen)
    (connected kitchen livingroom)
    (connected entrance kitchen)
    (connected kitchen entrance)
    (connected kitchen bedroom)
    (connected bedroom kitchen)
    (connected bedroom room)
    (connected room bedroom)
    (connected room gym)
    (connected gym room)
    (connected gym kitchen)
  )
  (:goal (and (visited bedroom) (visited gym)))
)
